channel.title: Teske Systemtechnik · Blog
channel.description: News, updates and insights from Teske Systemtechnik.

item.title: Book a consultation directly online
item.description: Pick a slot, pay securely via Stripe, get the Google Meet link by email right away. Online booking is now live.

item.title: The new website is live
item.description: teske-systemtechnik.de is live: projects, services and a clear look at how I work. Built on a lean, fast static setup.

item.title: Math Engine: an eval()-free expression interpreter for Python
item.description: A from-scratch evaluation engine for mathematical expressions, entirely without Python's eval(): tokenizer, recursive-descent parser, exact Decimal arithmetic and character-precise errors. Now live on PyPI, with 399 tests and 90% coverage.

item.title: Teske Systemtechnik is founded
item.description: Individual freelance projects become a dedicated studio for automation and custom software development.
